chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 105 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 27.08.2024 Petitioner Abdul Jabbar Palh, present in person. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondent No.2. M/s Abdul Qadir Shaikh and Abdul Basit Shaikh, Advocates for respondent No.3 along with Imtiaz Ahmed, Chief Municipal Officer and Ali Gulzar, Accounts Officer, Municipal Committee, Rohri. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- A statement is filed by Counsel for respondent No.3. Petitioner is present in person and states that he was performing duties somewhere else on verbal orders of his superiors. Counsel for respondent No.3 states that petitioner is not currently working with them, however, they are willing to have him joined the duties in the office of Municipal Committee, Rohri. The petitioner is ready to join the said office. Let his salary be released upon his joining. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
